With Azure Cosmos DB, not only your data, but also the backups of your data are highly redundant and resilient to regional disasters.

Operations are defined, added to the batch, and the batch is executed. If all operations succeed in the order they're described within the transactional batch operation, the transaction is committed. However, if any operation fails, the entire transaction is rolled back.
